question: Which tower is taller, 712 Fifth Avenue or Manhattan Life Insurance Building? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: 712 Fifth Avenue: 712 5th Avenue is a 650 ft skyscraper at 56th Street and Fifth Avenue in the Midtown neighborhood of Manhattan, New York City.

2.fact: Manhattan Life Insurance Building: The Manhattan Life Insurance Building was a 348 ft tower at 64-66 Broadway in New York City.
2.subquestion: How tall was the Manhattan Life Insurance Building?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: 712 Fifth Avenue is 650 ft tall, while the Manhattan Life Insurance Building was 348 ft tall, so 712 5th Avenue is taller. -> 712 5th Avenue
